关于 Sampson ChenAbout Sampson Chen
以投资者思维
服务每一位客户 Serving Every Client with
an Investor's Mindset

我叫 Sampson Chen，是 eXp Realty 的房地产经纪人（Realtor®）。毕业于北京大学，专业方向为金融与投资。与传统以交易为导向的服务不同，我更注重从长期资产配置与投资视角，帮助客户全面评估房地产价值。 I'm Sampson Chen, a Realtor® with eXp Realty. I graduated from Peking University (PKU) with a background in Finance and Investment. Unlike traditional transaction-focused agents, I prioritize a long-term asset allocation perspective to help clients evaluate real estate decisions comprehensively.

我个人曾投资并持有五处房产，对物业管理、市场选择以及长期财务规划中的实际挑战有着深刻理解。作为世界500强企业的前高级管理人员，我拥有丰富的国际项目管理经验，能高效、严谨地处理交易中的每一个细节。 I personally own and have invested in five properties, giving me firsthand understanding of property management, market selection, and the real challenges of long-term financial planning. As a former senior executive at Fortune 500 companies, I bring extensive international project management skills to every transaction.

诚信是我业务的核心。我始终将客户利益置于首位，坚持信息透明，致力于成为您长期可信赖的房产合作伙伴。 Integrity is the foundation of my practice. I always put clients first, maintain full transparency, and aim to be your long-term, trusted real estate partner — not just a one-time agent.

多语言服务：Languages spoken:

普通话 Mandarin English 四川话 粤语 Cantonese
为什么选择我Why Choose Sampson
您的房产决策
值得专业护航 Your Property Decision
Deserves Expert Guidance
01

专业分析能力Professional Analysis

凭借金融与投资背景，从宏观经济趋势、利率变化及长期资产配置角度分析市场，提供前瞻性投资建议，而非仅仅促成交易。Leveraging a Finance background to analyze market trends, interest rate shifts, and long-term portfolio strategy — delivering forward-looking advice beyond just closing deals.

02

投资者第一视角Investor-First Perspective

亲身投资持有五处房产，从选址、融资到物业管理均有实战经验，以真实投资者身份帮助您评估每一个决策。Personally owning five properties, with real experience in site selection, financing, and property management — I evaluate every decision as a genuine investor.

03

诚信与透明Integrity & Transparency

诚信是我业务的核心。我始终将客户利益置于首位，坚持信息透明，致力于成为您长期可信赖的房产合作伙伴。Integrity is at the core of everything I do. I always prioritize your interests and maintain full transparency — your long-term partner, not just your agent.

04

执行力与严谨性Execution & Precision

世界500强前高管，丰富的国际项目管理经验，高效严谨地处理房产交易中的每一个细节，确保流程顺畅无误。Former Fortune 500 executive with extensive international project management experience — handling every detail of your transaction efficiently and with precision.
